5:
There is a single five in the matrix, which means there is logic and analytical ability, intuition and shrewdness. At the same time such people can be cunning, though they themselves are very hard to deceive. They often strive to justify their own or others’ actions, and love to talk (and to gossip). Calculation: such people think for a long time before making any decision, weigh several options, and analyze a great deal. They are very afraid of making a mistake, because they do not forgive themselves errors, regret them for a long time and gnaw at themselves over them, and so they rarely take risks. A good sense of humor (self-irony). They notice even small details. Can we say they are dreamers?
Of course they can allow themselves to dream, but most often only in words, since they build their plans on reality. Very warm-hearted people who take on others’ pain. They have a strong connection with the cosmos. A talent for creativity and music. Much information comes to them through dreams.
 Ability in the mathematical sciences and in the financial and economic sphere. Lovers of criticizing themselves and others. Sometimes it is hard for such people to relax and switch off their powerful analytical mind.
 5 and 1, or 11, are mirror people. If there are many despots in their surroundings, they themselves become despotic. If they are surrounded by geniuses, they unfold their own talent.
55:
Brilliant analysts. Highly intelligent people. A powerful coefficient, serious gifts in science and diagnostics, well-developed intuition, an analytical cast of mind, a talent bordering on genius. They have the ability to see advantage and can be cunning, suspicious and distrustful. At the same time they may use cunning, though they themselves are very hard to deceive. Logic is strongly developed. They understand technology well, are «on friendly terms» with numbers (mathematical ability) and also have a humanities bent. With a «6» (perseverance) present, they can become fine technical specialists or financiers. Those with «55» know how to earn money, to realize themselves in business and also in creative work. Strong intuition. They possess powerful logical thinking that lets them draw conclusions which look like predictions.
Calculation: such people, before making any decision, think for a long time, weigh several options, analyze a great deal, and so may seem indecisive. But they are very afraid of making a mistake, they do not forgive themselves errors, they regret them for a long time and gnaw at themselves over them, which is why they rarely take risks.
They notice even the smallest details. The sign of the entrepreneur. Warm-hearted, good people, with strong intuition.
It is very hard for them to trust anyone; they expect a catch everywhere and consider everyone foolish. The thing is that they really are very intelligent and think quickly, so other people often seem slow-witted and dull to them.
They greatly love to criticize both themselves and others. Great lovers of self-analysis.
 Among people with a 55 indicator there are many perfectionists and pedants; they love to systematize and structure everything, since they have a pronounced need for order and systematization.
The potential of this sector must absolutely be realized; otherwise the person begins to analyze everything in sight, turning over hundreds of endless questions in their head, which leads to psychological problems. Their mighty brain begins literally to press down on them (because of this such people can become conflict-prone).
 For such people it is essential to learn to relax and, at least for a short while, to switch off their powerful mind.
Poor sleep is possible, along with headaches, insomnia, mental disorders, and unconventional sexual preferences. There is a risk of drug addiction, alcoholism, anorexia and other psychological problems. People with 5555 and 333 are meticulous, with a difficult character. They recognize a lie at first glance. The sign of the entrepreneur. Warm-hearted, good people and psychics.
Most people with 555 and more have large, wide-open eyes. In youth they have thick hair, and later go bald. Advanced people and geniuses. It is believed that they once held the book of life and can foretell the future (in science, in life). When there are threes and fives (regardless of their number), sensitivity is very strong, along with the ability to influence events — whatever they say comes true (the «cawing» effect). Those who have a two, a three and a five carry the sign of the divine. These people are connected to the cosmos by a silver thread.
And they are not tied to earthly life. They may leave early through an absurd death (the key is to have far-reaching plans and goals; they must have anchors and understand why they need to live here).
 Such children are always very inquisitive and curious; you must talk with them a great deal, tell them about everything in fine detail. It is essential to load such a strong coefficient (mental arithmetic, chess, robotics).
 I will put it briefly and clearly. 55/555 and more — the quality of logic is strongly developed, there is technical ability, and with a 6 present the person can become a fine technical specialist. Fives help to earn money in business, and with a 3 and a 7 present they help one realize oneself in creative work — a high intelligence coefficient.
555 and more — the person possesses powerful logical thinking that lets them draw conclusions which, to those around them, look like prophecy. Strongly developed logic helps investigative analysis and facts to flourish in a way that looks like prophecy. People with many fives blossom in a profession that brings them joy.
 Recommendations: a great deal of communication, learning languages, yoga, meditation.

нет:
The absence of the digit 5 in the matrix means the person rarely uses logic; they can be called a dreamer who is forever wandering in the clouds. A creative streak — the person has a very rich imagination. Creative thinking.
 The downside of this sector is gullibility.
With no fives present, one should not actively pursue technology and the exact sciences; it is best to choose a humanities direction or the arts. The person is a dreamer in life, finds it hard to accumulate money, and spends it thoughtlessly. If the person has a complete «intellectual triangle», then their quality of the five is strengthened. Firm, but not cruel, people. They say whatever comes into their head and may wound others by it. It is hard for them to show their romantic love, and because of this personal relationships suffer. If there is no 3/7, then by temperament they are cold people. Recommendations: to strengthen this, one should read much financial literature and train one’s thinking and logic. They can be blunt, saying everything they think (especially if the matrix has the duty no-8 or an 8).
